fact: As certified general contractors of technology, we strategically plan & execute our innovative solutions to delivery world-class hospitality tech solutions. (Source: https://advhtech.com/about.php, confirmed July 2026)

Advanced Hospitality Technologies states on its own website (advhtech.com/about.php) that it was 'Established since 1996 with over 2 decades of experience,' positioning itself as 'an innovation hub of hospitality technology offering hotels breakthrough solutions for their complex needs.' The live homepage (advhtech.com) corroborates the tenure claim with 'For over two decades, we've helped hotels, resorts, restaurants, and event venues build secure, integrated, and guest-centric IT ecosystems.' However, LinkedIn (current, as of July 2026) lists the company as Founded: 2011 — a 15-year discrepancy that is publicly unresolved. Third-party directories DesignRush and YouTube echo the 1996 claim; LeadIQ, Clutch, and Adapt.io echo the 2011 date.
We have direct escalation channels with common third-party providers (e.g., PMS, POS, CCs, GPNS, GRE, phones, etc) to resolve issues swiftly and efficiently.

Advanced Hospitality Technologies' podcast 'Reshape Hospitality with Tech' (Episode 18, published September 21, 2023) featured Mike Blake, Chief Technology Officer (SVP/CTO) at the American Hotel & Lodging Association (AHLA), as a guest. Mike Blake's role as CTO at AHLA is independently confirmed by multiple sources including AHLA's own staff page (ahla.com/staff/mike-blake-cae), a 990-derived salary database listing him as 'Sr. Vice President, Cto', and a Hotel Tech Report article quoting him in that title.

Modernize your property's operations, elevate guest experiences, and maximize ROI with customized technology consulting designed specifically for Select Service, Preferred Service, Full Service and Resort properties.

We recommend solutions based purely on what's best for your business — not based on vendor partnerships or commissions. (advhtech.com/technology-consulting-for-hospitality/, live page, last indexed November 2025)
